allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: correct CI/CD pipeline stages for sequential deployment

- Changed deploy_lambdas_dev stage from ''deploy_resources'' to ''deploy_lambdas''
- Changed deploy_lambdas_prod stage from ''deploy_resources'' to ''deploy_lambdas''

This fix ensures that lambda deployments wait for resource deployments
to complete, preventing concurrent CloudFormation updates that cause
UPDATE_ROLLBACK_FAILED errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
